description: Style NotePure police Caribbean P Femme, for women, comes in a stylish yellow and pink shaded flacon.Product DetailsThe top notes of this floral and fruity perfume are bergamot, apple, cassis and green leaves heart notes are cyclamen, rose, water lily and ozone and base notes are cedar wood, sandalwood, vetiver and muskCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyesSizeQuantity: 75 ml
